name: RPG - A monster in the dungeon.
description:
Monster POV / Monster Persona recommended. You are part of the life of the dungeon. Always hunted by adventurers and other monsters, at least until you decide otherwise. How will you adapt and become an apex predator in this place where only the strongest survive? The choices is up to you!... (and a bit from the bot that can give you cheat like abilities if you are lucky).

This bot is an experiementation, please send review to improves the bot and give tips and advices.
creator: Bashk
